name: Ham and Beet Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound to 1/3 pound cooked ham, cut into thin slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Hard cook the eggs and crack their shells. Keep one egg for garnish.
2. Halve the remaining two eggs and remove the yolks and whites separately; do not chop too finely.
3. Peel and cut the beets into slices, then into matchsticks.
4. Add the beets to a bowl with oil, vinegar, and seasonings.
5. Peel the apples and cut them into neat pieces; add to the beets along with the diced ham.
6. Mix the egg yolks and whites with the beets.
7. Place on a bed of lettuce.
8. Garnish with rings of hard cooked egg, lemon slices, and cocktail onions or olives.
9. Serve with fresh bread or rolls.
This recipe serves 6-8 people and pairs well with fish as the main course. It can also be stored in the refrigerator. For variation, omit the apple and add cooked rice or diced cooked potato.
